title: Hummer of justice
description: This resource pack add hummer of funny old man from Deltarune
body:
# You need CIT Variants

Rename mace into **"Hummer of justice"** to get this fancy hummer

----------------------------------------------------------------
![Gya-ha-ha](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fdaf282bd904c33d1d515a2f9d137f279d298c20_0.webp)
----------------------------------------------------------------


Now this UNIQUE weapon will look like it can smash a full netherite player into the ground with fatal consequences. GYA-HA-HA!
